dropped.reason: not captured this period: the frozen collector produced no record (GitHub /stats/commit_activity 202 unresolved within the collection window is the dominant transient cause; a genuinely deleted repo 404s). A DECLARED gap, not a silent drop.

note: Written by collectors/completeness_gate.py. Drops are recorded here (never silent). The snapshot proceeds for a small transient fraction; it FAILS only on a structural fraction (see max_drop_fraction).
